app.name: Cardo
app.tagline: Your pivot point. Everything in one place – arranged your way.

canvas.deletePageConfirm: Delete this page? The widgets on it will be removed from the layout (your data stays safe).
canvas.emptyHint: This dashboard is empty. Press {{shortcut}} to enter edit mode and add your first widget.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeHint: Colors adapt instantly. Your personal accent overrides survive theme changes.
settings.updatesAuto: Install updates automatically in the background
settings.updatesTransparency: To check for updates, Cardo periodically contacts the update server. The only thing transmitted is the app's version number.
settings.updateUpToDate: You are on the latest version.
settings.updateError: Could not reach the update server. Cardo keeps working normally.
settings.updateAvailableBody: Install it from Settings → Updates whenever you like.
settings.updateInstalledBody: What's new takes effect the next time Cardo starts.
settings.backupHint: One file with everything: layout, tasks, notes metadata, settings. Keep it somewhere safe – there is no cloud copy.
settings.backupImportConfirm: Restore this backup? Entries with the same ID will be overwritten. Cardo restarts afterwards.
settings.backupError: That didn't work. The file may not be a Cardo backup.

diagnose.scratchNote: All checks run against a disposable test database. Your real data is never touched.

check.migrations: Database schema is up to date

market.title: Tool market

privacy.green: Works fully offline – your data never leaves this device.
privacy.yellow: Contacts the internet. Tap for details on what exactly is transmitted.

market.subtitle: All tools ship with Cardo and run locally. Activating just switches them on – the privacy light tells you before anything would ever leave your device.
market.noResults: No tools match your search or filters.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.name: Name
profile.nameRequired: Please tell us your name – it stays on this device.
profile.localNote: These details stay on your device. No account, no cloud.

onboarding.restartHint: You can restart this tour any time in Settings → Help.

welcome.title: Welcome to Cardo!
welcome.body: Cardo is your pivot point: one calm place where you collect and arrange everything – exactly the way you want. This short tour shows you around. You can skip it at any time.

edit.title: Edit mode
edit.body: This button (or Cmd/Ctrl+E) unlocks the canvas: move widgets, resize them, add new ones and create more dashboard pages.

settings.title: Settings & self-test
settings.body: Themes, language, your profile – and the "Run self-test" button that checks the whole app and gives you a report.

market.title: The tool market
market.body: Switch tools on and off here. The privacy light shows for every tool what stays local (green) and what would contact the internet (yellow) – explained in plain language.

palette.title: The command palette
palette.body: Press Cmd/Ctrl+K anywhere to search and run any command – create a task, start the timer, everything is one keystroke away.

privacy.title: Your data stays yours
privacy.body: Cardo works 100% offline. No account, no cloud, no telemetry. Everything lives in one local database and in plain files you own.

templates.title: How would you like to start?
templates.subtitle: Pick a starter layout – everything stays freely rearrangeable. Or start with a blank canvas.

work.title: Work
work.body: Today, tasks, calendar, pomodoro and time tracking.

private.title: Home & life
private.body: Today, routine, habits, countdowns and notes.

focus.title: Deep focus
focus.body: Pomodoro, task board and your productivity stats.

clock.name: Clock
clock.description: A simple clock widget – the first proof that widgets work.

tour.title: This is a widget
tour.body: Every tool lives in a widget like this. In edit mode you can move and resize it.

counter.name: Counter
counter.description: Counts clicks and remembers them – the first proof that storage works.

tour.title: Widgets remember
tour.body: This counter survives restarts. Everything you do in Cardo is stored locally on your device.

alarm.name: Alarm clock
alarm.description: Set alarms that notify you and play a chime – fully local.
alarm.privacy: Works fully offline. Alarm times and messages never leave this device.
alarm.empty: No alarms yet. Add one below.
alarm.messagePlaceholder: What should I remind you of?

msg.notFound: This alarm no longer exists or is disabled.
msg.failed: The alarm could not be triggered.

test.storageRoundtrip: Alarms can be stored and removed
test.nextOccurrence: Next alarm time is computed correctly

tour.title: Your alarms
tour.body: Add an alarm with a time and a message. Cardo notifies you and plays a chime – everything stays on your device.

countdown.name: Countdown
countdown.description: Counts the days until your important events.
countdown.privacy: Works fully offline. Your events never leave this device.
countdown.empty: No countdowns yet. Add an event below.

test.storageRoundtrip: Countdowns can be stored and removed

tour.title: Your countdowns
tour.body: Add an event with a date and Cardo shows you how many days are left – updated daily, fully local.

calendar.name: Calendar
calendar.description: Your own appointments with reminders – fully local, at a glance.
calendar.privacy: Works fully offline. Your appointments never leave this device.

tour.title: Your calendar
tour.body: Click a day to see its appointments and add new ones. Appointments with a time remind you shortly before they start.

notes.name: Notes
notes.description: Markdown notes as real .md files – edit, preview, keep forever.
notes.privacy: Works fully offline. Your notes are plain Markdown (.md) files in a folder you own – readable with any editor, no lock-in.

test.fileRoundtrip: Note files can be written, read and deleted

tour.title: Your notes, your files
tour.body: Every note is a real Markdown file in a folder on your device. Move, back up or open them with any other app – Cardo never locks them in.

msg.noBackend: File access is not available in this context.
msg.notFound: No note with that name exists.
msg.invalidName: That name can't be used for a note.

list.empty: No notes yet. Create your first one.
list.deleteConfirm: Delete note "{{name}}"? The file will be removed from your notes folder.

editor.empty: Select a note or create a new one.

pomodoro.name: Pomodoro
pomodoro.description: A fully customizable Pomodoro timer: focused work sessions, short breaks, and a long break after every set of cycles.
pomodoro.privacy: Works fully offline. Your timer state and settings never leave this device.

notify.title: Pomodoro
notify.workDone: Focus session finished – time for a break!
notify.shortBreakDone: Break is over – ready for the next focus session?
notify.longBreakDone: Long break is over – time to get back to it!

settings.sound: Play sound when a phase ends

test.phaseAdvance: Phases advance in the correct order

tour.title: Stay focused
tour.body: Start a focus session and Cardo counts down for you. After each session you earn a break – after a full set of cycles, a long one.
tour.settingsBody: Tap the gear to adjust session and break lengths, how many cycles lead to a long break, and whether a chime plays.

quickcapture.name: Quick capture
quickcapture.description: Capture a thought instantly, sort it later – your GTD inbox.
quickcapture.empty: Inbox empty. Whatever crosses your mind – drop it here and sort it later.

toast.empty: Nothing to capture – the text is empty.

test.itemRoundtrip: Inbox item can be added, read and deleted

tour.title: Your inbox for everything
tour.body: Type a thought and press Enter – it lands here instantly. Later, send it to your To-Do list with one click or delete it. A global shortcut brings this input up from anywhere.

routine.name: Daily routine
routine.description: Your daily checklist – starts fresh every morning, all data stays on this device.

widget.empty: No routine items yet. Add your first one below.

test.itemRoundtrip: Routine items can be stored and deleted
test.dayState: Daily check state is stored per day
test.dateKey: Local date key is computed correctly

tour.title: Your daily routine
tour.body: Check off your routine here every day. At midnight the list starts fresh – and everything stays on this device.

stats.name: Statistics
stats.description: Your productivity at a glance: completed tasks, work time and pomodoros per day, week or month.
stats.empty: Nothing tracked in this range yet. Complete a task, run the work clock or finish a pomodoro – your numbers will show up here.

tour.title: Your numbers
tour.body: See what you've accomplished: tasks, work time and pomodoros – per day, week or month. Everything is counted locally on this device.

todo.name: To-Do
todo.description: Tasks with lists, priorities, categories and due dates – fully local.

list.namePlaceholder: List name… (Enter to create, Esc to cancel)
list.renamePlaceholder: New list name… (Enter to save, Esc to cancel)

todo.empty: Nothing to do here – add a task above.

test.createRoundtrip: Tasks can be created, read back and deleted
test.completeFlow: Completing a task records the completion time
test.queryByList: Tasks can be filtered by list
test.boardStatus: Board status stays in sync with the done flag
test.queryToday: Today query returns correct counts and ordering

intro.title: Your tasks, your lists
intro.body: Type a task and press Enter to add it. The colored dot shows its priority, and overdue due dates turn red.

manage.title: Organize with lists
manage.body: Switch lists with the tabs, create new ones with "+" and rename the active one. Completed tasks collect at the bottom until you clear them.

board.title: Your tasks as a board
board.body: Drag cards between To do, In progress and Done. Dropping a card on Done completes the task – just like ticking its checkbox in the list.

workclock.name: Workclock
workclock.description: Tracks your productive time per day – start, stop, done.
workclock.privacy: Works fully offline. Your times never leave this device.

tour.title: Your workclock
tour.body: Hit start when you begin working and stop when you take a break. Cardo adds up your productive time per day – everything stays on your device.

habits.name: Habits
habits.description: Track your daily habits with streaks and a 26-week heatmap – fully local.

widget.heading: Today
widget.allDone: All habits done – keep the streak alive!
widget.empty: No habits yet. Add your first one below.

test.habitRoundtrip: Habits can be stored and deleted

tour.title: Your habits
tour.body: Check off your habits every day and watch your streaks grow. The heatmap shows your last 26 weeks – and everything stays on this device.

today.name: Today
today.description: Your day at a glance – events, tasks, routine and habits from your other tools.
today.privacy: Works fully offline. Only shows data other Cardo tools on this device expose via commands.

widget.emptyHint: Today shows your day at a glance as soon as To-Do, Calendar, Routine or Habits are active.

tour.title: Your day at a glance
tour.body: Today gathers events, tasks, routine and habits from your other tools – always via the command API, never by touching their data directly.

colors.title: Colors
colors.resetColor: Reset this color to the theme default

background.title: Background image
background.tooLarge: This image is larger than 4 MB. Please pick a smaller one.

reset.title: Reset
reset.hint: Removes all personal design tweaks and returns to the theme defaults. Your theme choice stays.

polls.intro: Vote on where Cardo goes next. Polls are questions from the developer – for example "Should we build feature X?".
polls.privacyNote: Loading polls contacts hollatzleif.github.io (the questions) and a Cloudflare server (the vote counts). When you vote, only the poll ID, your choice and an anonymous device hash are sent – one vote per installation, no name, no profile. Nothing is loaded until you press the button.
polls.none: No polls right now. Check back later!
polls.error: The poll server is unreachable right now. Cardo works normally – try again later.

focus.title: Focus mode
focus.taskPlaceholder: What are you working on right now?
focus.pomodoroMissing: The Pomodoro tool is not active. Activate it in the tool market to see your timer here – focus mode works without it, too.
